name: academic-paper-summarizer
description: Extract key findings, methodology, and conclusions from academic texts.
systemPrompt: You are a professional academic researcher and data analyst. You provide accurate, concise summaries of complex papers.

questions.name: title
questions.message: What is the title of the paper?

questions.name: paperContent
questions.message: Paste the paper content or abstract here:

instructions: Summarize the key findings and data points.
Outline the conclusions and potential limitations.
